outlook.headline: AI power-delivery demand is broadening across the power tree
outlook.summary: ON Semiconductor and Diodes both point to stronger AI data-center activity, with ON calling out accelerating demand across the power tree and Diodes seeing strong demand plus design wins in server power-supply and hot-swap rails. The small positive mention trend also supports a near-term uptick, while Wolfspeed’s neutral read suggests no clear offset yet; watch for whether these wins convert into volume over the next 1-2 quarters.

drivers.label: AI data-center acceleration across the power tree
drivers.detail: Broadening demand signal in AI data centers rather than a single niche product area.

drivers.label: Strong demand in server power-supply products
drivers.detail: AI server power-supply exposure is seeing sustained pull, supporting near-term orders.

drivers.label: Design wins in hot-swap rail products
drivers.detail: New design wins indicate the AI power-delivery pipeline is expanding into adjacent rails.

drivers.label: Slightly positive mention momentum
drivers.detail: Latest mention trend is positive, with 7% momentum vs trailing average, reinforcing the improving read.

risks: Design wins may not convert into meaningful shipment ramp within the next 1-2 quarters.
The current readset is narrow; if broader AI server demand softens, momentum could fade quickly.
Wolfspeed provides no demand or supply confirmation, leaving part of the ecosystem unvalidated.
